subject: fix(ui): fix FontAwesome className misuse, deduplicate DebugPill tabs
body:
className on @expo/vector-icons FontAwesome components is silently ignored —
it's not a React Native View. Replaced with style={{ marginTop: 2 }}.

DebugPill had 3 near-identical tab button blocks (log/env/pwa) that only
differed in the tab ID and label. Refactored to a .map() over a tabs array.

Tags: fix, cleanup, debug, search
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-integration
Semver: patch
